name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
TableReserve helps you book a restaurant table without the back-and-forth.

Guests: tap Book a table, pick a date and time, and you'll get a reference code.
Owners: use /bookings for today's capacity and /settings to set hours, tables, and reminders.

Tap /start anytime to open the menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
